fields.name: Burning Strike
fields.description: A blow wreathed in sudden flame that sears as it lands.

fields.name: Kindled Edge
fields.description: The weapon's edge takes and holds a lick of fire.

fields.name: Cinder Guard
fields.description: A whirl of hot cinders bats aside the incoming blow.

fields.name: Heat Shimmer
fields.description: The air around the caster warps and swims; blows slide wide.

fields.name: Ember Step
fields.description: A gust of furnace-heat at the back propels the charge.

fields.name: Firebrand
fields.description: A gout of flame hurled from the open hand.

fields.name: Warmth of the Hearth
fields.description: A homely heat that steadies allies against cold and fear alike.

fields.name: Scorch Mark
fields.description: A brand laid on stone or wood that flares when crossed.

fields.name: Candle Discipline
fields.description: Perfect command of small flames — lit, snuffed, steadied, sent.

fields.name: Reading the Ash
fields.description: What burned here, how hot, and in what order — read from the ash.

fields.name: Ignition Calculus
fields.description: Fire's spread through a room predicted to the second.

fields.name: Pyre Blessing
fields.description: Consecrated flame offered up, then loosed at the profane.

fields.name: Flame Ward
fields.description: A low ring of flame the unwelcome must think hard about crossing.

fields.name: Smoke Screen
fields.description: A roll of thick smoke swallows the caster's outline — cover, not vanishing.

fields.name: Dancing Spark
fields.description: A spark leaps and flares where the caster is not; every eye follows it.

fields.name: Trancefire
fields.description: A banked flame that draws every gaze and holds it; the speaker's words slip in beneath.

fields.name: Kindled Hearts
fields.description: The speaker's passion catches like tinder; a room's courage lights from it.

fields.name: Incendiary Word
fields.description: An idea left smoldering in the listener; it flares when someone fans it.

fields.name: Scalding Rebuke
fields.description: The rebuke lands as actual heat — cheeks blister as if slapped by flame.

fields.name: Ember Servant
fields.description: A fist-sized flame coaxed into obedience — it fetches light, sears a rope, dances; the first lesson in making fire obey.

fields.name: Stonefist Strike
fields.description: The blow lands with a hillside's slow, total weight.

fields.name: Iron Skin
fields.description: The skin takes on the gray patience of iron.

fields.name: Leaden Aura
fields.description: Limbs near the caster grow heavy as poured lead.

fields.name: Tremor Sense
fields.description: Every footfall within the walls felt through the soles.

fields.name: Dust Veil
fields.description: A curtain of fine dust hangs where the caster was.

fields.name: Sure Footing
fields.description: The ground does not betray the caster — not on scree, not on ice.

fields.name: Shard Throw
fields.description: A fistful of gravel hurled with a sling's force.

fields.name: Mason's Eye
fields.description: The stresses in stone and wall read at a glance — where it holds, where it fails.

fields.name: Sealed Door
fields.description: Stone flows like slow mud to bar a doorway for a while.

fields.name: Blessing of the Bedrock
fields.description: An ally set immovable — braced by the bones of the earth.

fields.name: Earthen Grasp
fields.description: The ground closes on a target's boots and holds.

fields.name: Broken Ground
fields.description: The earth churns underfoot; the charge arrives stumbling.

fields.name: Voice of the Foundations
fields.description: Words laid course on course beneath a listener; their resolve stands on bedrock.

fields.name: Fault Line
fields.description: The speaker finds the crack in a resolve and speaks straight into it; certainty crumbles.

fields.name: Word of Weight
fields.description: A pronouncement that lands like dropped stone; the body buckles under it.

fields.name: Stone Face
fields.description: Face and frame set like a statue; blows and barbs alike glance off.

fields.name: Clay Servant
fields.description: A bucketful of earth persuaded to hold shape and walk — the first lesson in making earth obey.

fields.name: Frostbite Edge
fields.description: The blade rimes over; wounds it gives burn cold long after.

fields.name: Rime Mail
fields.description: Frost thickens across cloth and skin into pale armor.

fields.name: Winter's Grip
fields.description: Cold seizes the joints; fingers forget their cunning.

fields.name: Ice Dart
fields.description: A spike of clear ice thrown hard enough to punch leather.

fields.name: Hush of Snow
fields.description: Sound deadens around the caster as under fresh snowfall.

fields.name: Breathless Chill
fields.description: The caster's warmth banks to nothing — heat-readers and hounds find no one.

fields.name: Preserver's Touch
fields.description: A body, a bloom, a meal held against decay for days.

fields.name: Clear Ice Lens
fields.description: A lens of flawless ice that brings the far ridge close.

fields.name: Frozen Vigil
fields.description: A threshold rimed against the unwelcome; crossing it costs.

fields.name: Killing Frost
fields.description: A gripping touch that blackens flesh with deep cold.

fields.name: Snow-Blind
fields.description: A sudden flurry where the target's eyes are.

fields.name: Chilling Word
fields.description: A sentence that drops the room's temperature; fear arrives with the frost.

fields.name: Let Go
fields.description: The freezing man's mercy, spoken aloud — it would be so easy to stop; one listener's grip eases.

fields.name: Heartfrost
fields.description: Words that reach in and frost the heart's pace; the chest seizes.

fields.name: Winter's Composure
fields.description: A perfect glacial calm; rage and blades alike slide off it.

fields.name: Rime Servant
fields.description: A mote of living frost that obeys — it chills the lock, rimes the rail, waits in the keyhole; the first lesson in making cold obey.

fields.name: Static Edge
fields.description: Lightning crawls the blade in thin white threads.

fields.name: Gale Step
fields.description: A wind rises at the caster's back exactly when needed.

fields.name: Thunderclap
fields.description: A peal from empty air that staggers the line.

fields.name: Called Bolt
fields.description: A thin stroke of lightning answers from a clear sky.

fields.name: Fogbank
fields.description: Fog gathers thick and sudden, swallowing the caster's outline.

fields.name: Pressure Drop
fields.description: Ears ache and hearts misgive — the body knows a storm is owed.

fields.name: Wind's Warning
fields.description: The breeze carries word of what approaches upwind.

fields.name: Storm Reading
fields.description: Tomorrow's weather known today, to the hour.

fields.name: Charged Air
fields.description: The air crackles; an ally's next blow rides the discharge.

fields.name: Squall Shield
fields.description: A whipping circular wind that bats arrows and thrown steel aside.

fields.name: Voice of the Gale
fields.description: Words carried a valley away, or snatched from a shouting mouth.

fields.name: Rallying Thunder
fields.description: A low rumble rolls under the speaker's words; hearts steady.

fields.name: Sky Omen
fields.description: The sky's favor read in cloud and crow.

fields.name: Gale Servant
fields.description: A handspan of wind bound to the caster's word — it snuffs, tugs, carries a whisper across the square; the first lesson in making the wind obey.

fields.name: Hound's Tongue
fields.description: Plain speech with beasts — they answer as plainly as they can.

fields.name: Pack Sense
fields.description: Where every packmate stands, known without looking.

fields.name: Unlosable Trail
fields.description: A scent once taken is never lost — not in rain, not in a crowd.

fields.name: Hunter's Patience
fields.description: A stillness no cramp, cold, or boredom can break.

fields.name: Predator's Lunge
fields.description: A beast's whole speed spent in the first spring.

fields.name: Thick Pelt
fields.description: The hide toughens like a boar's back.

fields.name: Warning Hackles
fields.description: Danger felt at the neck before it is seen — the caster is already moving.

fields.name: Beast's Eye
fields.description: A moment borrowed through a nearby animal's senses.

fields.name: Herd Words
fields.description: A murmur that calms — or spooks — every animal in earshot.

fields.name: Master of Hounds
fields.description: Beasts at the caster's word fight like they mean it.

fields.name: Mark of the Hunt
fields.description: Named quarry cannot slip the caster's notice again.

fields.name: Fang and Claw
fields.description: Fighting as beasts do — low, fast, and without apology.

fields.name: Beast Command
fields.description: One sharp word a beast obeys before it decides to — sit, stay, drop it.

fields.name: First Friend
fields.description: A beast honestly won over stays won — the beginning of every companion bond.

fields.name: Claw Growth
fields.description: Nails lengthen and harden into talons that open mail.

fields.name: Hide Like Horn
fields.description: The skin plates over, dull and tough as old horn.

fields.name: Knit Flesh
fields.description: A wound closed by remaking what was torn.

fields.name: Lengthened Stride
fields.description: Legs remade for the road; the miles come easier.

fields.name: Soft Steps
fields.description: Feet reshaped to fall silent on any floor.

fields.name: Borrowed Features
fields.description: Small changes — a nose, a jawline, the set of the eyes; never a whole face.

fields.name: Iron Stomach
fields.description: Eat what would drop a dog; poisons pass through grumbling.

fields.name: Anatomist's Cut
fields.description: A strike placed with a surgeon's exact unkindness.

fields.name: Reading the Body
fields.description: Health, old wounds, and the lies of posture read at a glance.

fields.name: Mender's Hands
fields.description: Flesh coaxed back to what it meant to be.

fields.name: Bristle
fields.description: Mass and menace for a heartbeat — the room remembers seeing something inhuman.

fields.name: Blood Edge
fields.description: The weapon weeps crimson energy, burning what it cuts.

fields.name: Coagulate
fields.description: Blood hardens into a crimson shell that deflects blows.

fields.name: Blood Rush
fields.description: Blood surges through the caster, propelling them forward.

fields.name: Crimson Fang
fields.description: A blade slicked with burning blood that sears on contact.

fields.name: Pulse Track
fields.description: The caster feels the heartbeats of nearby living things.

fields.name: Blood Sight
fields.description: Reads the blood of others, sensing lineage and health.

fields.name: Vital Lens
fields.description: Blood-tinted vision reveals the life force of all nearby.

fields.name: Quiet Pulse
fields.description: Stills the caster's own heartbeat and breath to a whisper — hounds and blood-readers find nothing.

fields.name: Crimson Cloak
fields.description: A shimmering red haze makes the caster difficult to perceive.

fields.name: Blood Fever
fields.description: Words that heat the target's blood to scalding — judgment clouds as the veins burn.

fields.name: Vitality Surge
fields.description: The caster's burning blood inspires and invigorates allies.

fields.name: Quickened Heart
fields.description: Sets one listener's pulse to the speaker's own — courage, panic, or calm, lent.

fields.name: Blood Offering
fields.description: Crimson energy offered up, then hurled at the unworthy.

fields.name: Sanguine Shield
fields.description: A barrier of consecrated blood that turns harm aside.

fields.name: Hemorrhage
fields.description: A precisely targeted disruption of the target's blood flow.

fields.name: Plasma Ward
fields.description: A shell of crystallized blood energy that absorbs damage.

fields.name: Savage Strike
fields.description: Wrath poured whole into a single blow.

fields.name: Shrug It Off
fields.description: The wound is noted, filed, and felt some other day.

fields.name: Red Veil
fields.description: Fear dies and pain recedes behind the red.

fields.name: Last to Fall
fields.description: The body refuses the arithmetic of the odds and stands anyway.

fields.name: Battle Howl
fields.description: A howl that shakes the enemy line and carries the pack forward.

fields.name: Alpha Presence
fields.description: The room understands, wordlessly, who leads here.

fields.name: Blood-Up
fields.description: Tempers around the caster stoked into courage.

fields.name: Righteous Wrath
fields.description: Anger consecrated; the weapon remembers every reason.

fields.name: Unbowed
fields.description: The will does not kneel; the body stands through what should fell it.

fields.name: Calculated Fury
fields.description: Rage budgeted like coin and spent to the copper.

fields.name: Cold Anger
fields.description: Fury banked into one strike of terrible deliberateness.

fields.name: Grave Strike
fields.description: A blow that lands with the cold, patient weight of the grave.

fields.name: Bone Ward
fields.description: A lattice of spectral bone catches the blow that should have killed.

fields.name: Death March
fields.description: The tireless stride of the honored dead — the caster does not slow, stumble, or stop.

fields.name: Pallbearers
fields.description: Unseen hands of the dead take part of any burden — a shield braced, a gate held, a body carried.

fields.name: Ghoul's Touch
fields.description: A numbing touch that stills breath and slows blood.

fields.name: Shroud Walk
fields.description: Steps wrapped in grave-quiet, unheard even on stone.

fields.name: Grave Sight
fields.description: Sees where death has been — and where it still lingers.

fields.name: Wailing Hex
fields.description: A keening that cracks resolve and bone alike.

fields.name: Spirit Veil
fields.description: A murmured word draws the lingering dead close as a screen.

fields.name: Ancestral Voice
fields.description: Speaks with the borrowed authority of the dead.

fields.name: Grievance Spoken
fields.description: Names a dead person's wrong aloud; the naming has weight the living can feel.

fields.name: Grave Bolt
fields.description: Grave-cold hurled as force.

fields.name: Bone Circle
fields.description: A ring of bone-pale light the risen will not cross.

fields.name: Spirit Communion
fields.description: Opens a rite-space in which the dead may answer.

fields.name: Death's Calculation
fields.description: Reads a death — cause, time, and what it fed.

fields.name: Warding Glyph
fields.description: A grave-glyph that bars the unquiet.

fields.name: Seance Lens
fields.description: A reading-glass for what lingers.

fields.name: Grave Servant
fields.description: A lingering shade beckoned into small service — it watches a door, carries a whisper, chills a room; the first lesson in commanding the dead.

fields.name: Shadow Blade
fields.description: An edge of drawn darkness that cuts where light cannot follow.

fields.name: Blur Step
fields.description: The outline smears mid-motion; the blow lands where the caster was.

fields.name: Unseen Edge
fields.description: The strike arrives from the one angle nobody watched.

fields.name: Doubt's Touch
fields.description: A chill of unreasoning misgiving laid on the target's neck.

fields.name: Silent Passage
fields.description: Footfalls swallowed whole; even the floorboards keep the secret.

fields.name: Lampblack
fields.description: Every nearby flame gutters low at once.

fields.name: Shadow's Grasp
fields.description: A shadow closes on an ankle and holds for one heartbeat.

fields.name: Dark Adaption
fields.description: The near-dark opens like a lit room.

fields.name: Dread Presence
fields.description: The dark visibly stands behind the speaker's words.

fields.name: Umbral Bulwark
fields.description: Shadow banked and packed into something that takes the blow.

fields.name: Night Watch
fields.description: A vigil-ward of shadow that wakes the caster when crossed.

fields.name: Shadow Theory
fields.description: What the shadows in a room remember, read out of their angles.

fields.name: Shadow Servant
fields.description: A scrap of dark coaxed into errands — it carries, hides, and listens at the wall; the first lesson in making shadow obey.

fields.name: Silk Thread
fields.description: A thread of will laid so lightly that one small suggestion simply seems reasonable.

fields.name: Mind Lance
fields.description: Will hurled as a spike of white pain.

fields.name: Iron Resolve
fields.description: The caster's own mind walled and gated against intrusion.

fields.name: Held Gaze
fields.description: The target finds, with rising unease, that they cannot easily look away.

fields.name: Puppet's Stumble
fields.description: One limb twitches at precisely the wrong moment.

fields.name: Reading the Strings
fields.description: What moves a person — wants, fears, debts — seen like threads under skin.

fields.name: Quiet Suggestion
fields.description: A thought left behind like a coin dropped in a pocket, found later and kept.

fields.name: Web of Attention
fields.description: The focus of several minds tracked at once, like flies on a web.

fields.name: Word of Command
fields.description: One barked word — halt, kneel, drop — obeyed before thought catches up.

fields.name: Presence of the Spider
fields.description: The room defers without quite deciding to.

fields.name: Witchfire Bolt
fields.description: Emerald flame that eats what it touches and leaves no honest ash.

fields.name: Honeyed Word
fields.description: Poison that tastes like praise going down.

fields.name: Venomed Edge
fields.description: The blade sweats a thin green sheen; wounds go bad at once.

fields.name: Rot's Patience
fields.description: An object aged years in moments — the lock rusts, the rope frays, the beam sags.

fields.name: Blight Mark
fields.description: The target's strength runs to water under a spreading gray bloom.

fields.name: Emerald Balm
fields.description: A tamer venom burns out a crueler one; the cure is also a dose.

fields.name: Sweet Decay
fields.description: Spoilage, venom, and sickness slide off the Goddess's favorites.

fields.name: Laughing Curse
fields.description: A jibe that sticks as a hex — the room laughs, and the barb draws real blood.

fields.name: Toxin Lore
fields.description: Poisons known by taste, smell, and symptom, at a sniff.

fields.name: Caustic Spray
fields.description: A flung arc of green bile that pits steel.

fields.name: Witchfire Shield
fields.description: A lattice of cold green flame that unmakes what tries to pass.

fields.name: Costume Change
fields.description: Garments reweave themselves at a gesture — rags to livery, livery to rags.

fields.name: Mirror Guard
fields.description: A glimmering double takes the blow and shatters into light.

fields.name: Stage Exit
fields.description: A flourish, a distraction, and the caster is somehow across the room.

fields.name: Face of the Hour
fields.description: Features drift toward what the onlooker expected to see — never a particular face.

fields.name: Glass Dagger
fields.description: A shard of hardened seeming, real enough to wound until it is disbelieved.

fields.name: Limelight
fields.description: All eyes drawn to the caster, and kept.

fields.name: Upstaged
fields.description: The target becomes, briefly, the least interesting thing in the room.

fields.name: The Prop
fields.description: A small object that reads as real until the second touch.

fields.name: Set Dressing
fields.description: A room reads richer, poorer, or other than it is.

fields.name: Critic's Eye
fields.description: Sees through paint, glamour, and rehearsed sincerity alike.

fields.name: Standing Ovation
fields.description: Applause conjured and contagious; the crowd's mood follows its own hands.

fields.name: Heckler's Curse
fields.description: The target's words keep coming out wrong at the worst moments.

fields.name: Curtain
fields.description: A fall of seeming-dark across a doorway; what is behind it goes unguessed.

fields.name: Shattering Chorus
fields.description: A held note that cracks stone and bone alike.

fields.name: Resonant Ward
fields.description: A standing tone the blow must fight through, and loses to.

fields.name: Inspiring Refrain
fields.description: Hearts rise to the melody whether they meant to or not.

fields.name: Discordant Note
fields.description: One sour interval that unstrings nerves and knees.

fields.name: Lullaby
fields.description: Drowsiness settling over the room like snow.

fields.name: Carrying Voice
fields.description: Heard clearly at the back of the plaza, in a whisper.

fields.name: Drumbeat March
fields.description: A cadence that keeps the line moving when legs want to stop.

fields.name: War Chant
fields.description: The blow falls on the beat, and the beat falls harder.

fields.name: Hymn of the Door
fields.description: A sung ward laid on a threshold; it holds while the song is remembered.

fields.name: Litany Against Fear
fields.description: Spoken in rounds; fear finds no purchase between the lines.

fields.name: Harmonic Theory
fields.description: Every object's breaking note, found by ear.

fields.name: Counterpoint
fields.description: Another caster's rhythm picked apart from inside.

fields.name: Silver Tongue
fields.description: Words gilded until refusal feels like rudeness.

fields.name: Commanding Presence
fields.description: The voice that fills a room and empties an argument.

fields.name: Sweet Nothings
fields.description: Flattery murmured to a stuck lock, a guttering lamp, a leaning gate — things with no mind at all try a little harder for the speaker.

fields.name: Smiting Light
fields.description: Light that burns the abyssal and shames the merely wicked.

fields.name: Sacred Ward
fields.description: A circle of soft radiance the dark hesitates at.

fields.name: Blessing of Strength
fields.description: Strength lent from somewhere that has plenty.

fields.name: Gentle Mending
fields.description: Small hurts knitted closed in warm light.

fields.name: Undying Lamp
fields.description: A flame of light that wind, water, and malice cannot put out.

fields.name: Sunblade
fields.description: The edge sheathed in a strip of daybreak.

fields.name: Dawnplate
fields.description: Light lies on armor like gilding, and holds like steel.

fields.name: Revealing Light
fields.description: Glamours, shadows, and rehearsed faces burn away in it.

fields.name: Beacon Cry
fields.description: A shout that is also a flare; allies rally to it across the field.

fields.name: Word of Absolution
fields.description: Guilt's weight lifted for an hour — long enough to act.

fields.name: Lumen Script
fields.description: Writing in patient light that outlasts the writer's stay.

fields.name: Judgment's Weight
fields.description: The target feels, precisely, how they would be weighed.

fields.name: Force Sigil
fields.description: A drawn sigil discharges as a fist of force.

fields.name: Arcane Barrier
fields.description: A drawn line becomes a wall of standing will.

fields.name: Empowering Glyph
fields.description: A mark that lends strength for as long as it glows.

fields.name: Unraveling Hex
fields.description: Knots of magic picked loose one loop at a time.

fields.name: Light Script
fields.description: Writing in hanging light, for lecture or graffiti.

fields.name: Warded Blade
fields.description: Sigils down the fuller wake when the blade does.

fields.name: Shieldwright's Mark
fields.description: A glyph on shield or armor that braces at the moment of impact.

fields.name: True Name, Spoken
fields.description: A thing's right name, said rightly, commands its attention.

fields.name: Sealing Word
fields.description: A spoken seal closes door, box, or letter to all but the named.

fields.name: Thief's Mark
fields.description: An unseen glyph that remembers everyone who passed it.

fields.name: Inkless Cipher
fields.description: A message hidden on a plain surface, legible to one reader.

fields.name: Patient Sigil
fields.description: A stored working waits in the mark until called.

fields.name: Scribe's Eye
fields.description: Reads glyphs, wards, and — with care — their makers' habits.

fields.name: Binding Chalk
fields.description: A chalked circle that holds what steps inside it, briefly.

fields.name: Sworn Blade
fields.description: A blade sworn to a task bites harder in that task's service.

fields.name: Oathkeeper's Stand
fields.description: While the sworn charge holds, blows glance from the one keeping it.

fields.name: Geas of the Guest
fields.description: Hospitality bound; guest and host both feel exactly where the line is.

fields.name: Binding Handshake
fields.description: A bargain sealed skin to skin; both parties always know if it holds.

fields.name: Word of Witness
fields.description: An oath spoken before the caster cannot afterward be denied.

fields.name: Liar's Sting
fields.description: A sworn-false word burns the mouth that says it.

fields.name: Promise's Weight
fields.description: An unkept promise hangs on the target where everyone can see it.

fields.name: Vowsight
fields.description: The vows on a person seen like knotted threads.

fields.name: Champion's Charge
fields.description: Sworn to someone's defense, and stronger inside that oath than outside it.

fields.name: Covenant Ward
fields.description: A pact-circle that stands hard against all who ever broke faith with it.

fields.name: Contract Law
fields.description: A bargain's holes and hooks seen at a glance.

fields.name: Escrow Seal
fields.description: An object bound shut until the terms are met.

fields.name: Retribution Clause
fields.description: A written pact that collects its penalty from the breaker, in kind.

fields.name: Mirrorwalk
fields.description: Step into an open mirror and out the other side, wherever its twin waits open on the network.

fields.name: Vanguard Strike
fields.description: A Vanguard vow technique.

fields.name: Vanguard Guard
fields.description: A defensive Vanguard vow technique.

fields.name: Bulwark Strike
fields.description: A Bulwark vow technique.

fields.name: Bulwark Guard
fields.description: A defensive Bulwark vow technique.

fields.name: Luminary Strike
fields.description: A Luminary vow technique.

fields.name: Luminary Guard
fields.description: A defensive Luminary vow technique.
